fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project overview documentation for a React and Vite application template, covering HMR, available React plugins, React Compiler notes, and ESLint expansion guidance.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: HTML application shell that defines the root mount element and loads the Vite module entry script for the React app.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Package manifest for the React and Vite app, defining development, build, lint, and preview scripts plus React, Vite, and ESLint dependencies.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Defines suggested ignore patterns for Understand-Anything analysis, including generated artifacts, editor files, logs, and common test file conventions. Most entries are commented guidance rather than active exclusions.

fileNodes.name: eslint.config.js
fileNodes.summary: Configures ESLint for JavaScript and JSX files with recommended JavaScript rules, React Hooks rules, Vite React Refresh checks, and browser globals.

fileNodes.name: App.css
fileNodes.summary: Styles the main React application view, including the hero artwork, counter button, next-step panels, responsive layout, and decorative section separators.

fileNodes.name: App.jsx
fileNodes.summary: Defines the primary React application component with a starter hero, interactive counter state, documentation links, and community links. It imports local styling and image assets used by the rendered UI.

fileNodes.name: index.css
fileNodes.summary: Provides global theme variables, base document styles, typography, root container layout, code styling, and dark-mode overrides for the application.

fileNodes.name: main.jsx
fileNodes.summary: Bootstraps the React application by creating the root renderer, applying StrictMode, loading global CSS, and mounting the App component into the DOM.

fileNodes.name: vite.config.js
fileNodes.summary: Configures Vite to use the official React plugin for JSX transformation and React development features.
